header.description: Static report metadata and batch identification.

rows.description: Unpivoted material consumption details per bin.

semantics: The report filters batches by date range if provided. Within a batch, all 12 bins are expanded into individual rows. Calculations are performed at the row level for error, then aggregated for totals.
transformations: Melt bin1_content through bin12_content into row_material_name
Melt bin1_sp through bin12_sp into row_set_wt_kg
Melt bin1_act through bin12_act into row_ach_wt_kg
Compute row_error_kg as actual minus set
Sum row values for batch totals
